menu.name: Chicken Dim Sum
menu.description: Steamed dumplings filled with seasoned chicken and ginger, served with soy dipping sauce.

menu.name: Peking Duck
menu.description: Crispy roasted duck with thin pancakes, scallions, and hoisin sauce.

menu.name: Kung Pao Chicken
menu.description: Wok-tossed chicken with peanuts, dried chilies, and Sichuan peppercorns.

menu.name: Mapo Tofu
menu.description: Silken tofu in fiery Sichuan chili bean paste with minced pork.

menu.name: Spring Rolls
menu.description: Crispy golden rolls stuffed with shredded vegetables and glass noodles.

menu.name: Sweet and Sour Pork
menu.description: Battered pork tossed in tangy pineapple and bell pepper sauce.

menu.name: Dan Dan Noodles
menu.description: Hand-pulled noodles in spicy sesame sauce with minced pork and chili oil.

menu.name: Hakka Noodles
menu.description: Wok-fried noodles with mixed vegetables and soy sauce.

menu.name: Fried Rice
menu.description: Wok-tossed jasmine rice with egg, scallions, and soy.

menu.name: Wonton Soup
menu.description: Clear broth with delicate pork and shrimp wontons.

menu.name: Mango Pudding
menu.description: Silky smooth mango pudding topped with coconut cream.

menu.name: Jasmine Tea
menu.description: Fragrant jasmine pearl tea, freshly brewed.
